title: ICGEB – Research Associate and Project Associate – 2 Posts
shortInfo: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1. Candidates with Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS, ME/M.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ICGEB official website.

basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1. Candidates with Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS, ME/M.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ICGEB official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or 3 years of research, teaching, and industrial experience after an ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in a peer-reviewed journal, Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or any other relevant field from a recognized university or equivalent

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICGEB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
